general.subject: Quick website audit for {business_name} — {city}
general.body:
Hi there,

I ran a quick audit of {business_name}'s website ({website_url}) and found a few technical issues that may be costing you new patients:

{website_issues}

Most patients in {city} now search for doctors on Google, JustDial, and Practo — and your clinic's online presence directly affects how many walk through your door.

I'm an AI & web automation engineer who helps clinics across India get more patients through a modern website, WhatsApp booking, and automated appointment reminders.

See a live example of what I built:
{promo_url}

Would you be open to a quick 5-minute call this week to see how this could work for {business_name}?

Best regards,
Aditya Tyagi
AI & Automation Engineer
+91-XXXXXXXXXX
